---
title: "CV"
---

# Resume

::: {.cv-hero}

## Alina Chen

Marketing Analytics · Market Intelligence · Business Strategy

Graduate student with experience across **marketing, analytics, business development, and market research**.

[↓ Download Resume](assets/Alina%20Chen_Business%20Analytics.pdf){.btn .btn-primary}

:::

## Education

::: {.edu-grid}

::: {.edu-card}

![](assets/Boston-University-Emblem.png){.school-logo}

### Boston University

Master of Science

Applied Business Analytics

Boston · 2025–2026

:::

::: {.edu-card}

![](assets/EXCELIA_LOGO_RVB.png){.school-logo}

### Excelia Business School

Bachelor of Business Administration

Marketing and Sales Management

France · 2021–2025

:::

::: {.cv-stat}
💼

### Experience

Marketing · Analytics · Sales
:::

::: {.cv-stat}
📊

### Tools

Python · SQL · Tableau
:::

:::

## Core Strengths

::: {.resume-grid}

::: {.resume-card}

<i class="fa-solid fa-chart-line"></i>

### Business Analytics

Transforming data into business insights and decisions.

:::

::: {.resume-card}

<i class="fa-solid fa-magnifying-glass-chart"></i>

### Market Intelligence

Researching industries, products, and market opportunities.

:::

::: {.resume-card}

<i class="fa-solid fa-bullhorn"></i>

### Marketing & Growth

Building campaigns and customer engagement strategies.

:::

:::

## Experience Highlights

::: {.timeline}

### Growth Marketing

Lead generation · Campaign execution · CRM

### Business Consulting

Industry research · Executive presentation · Strategy

### Market Intelligence

Research · Competitive analysis · Storytelling

:::
